title: Deep reading app design specification
first_prompt: I want you to help me think through the design of a "deep reading" app. I want to craft a detailed specification that can be used by Claude Code to build the app. I'm going to describe it for you as b
summary: Irwin sought to develop a detailed specification for a "deep reading" application designed to restore cognitive focus while reading digital texts. The conversation established the app's initial target as iPad, accepting HTML, EPUB, and Markdown as primary source formats while treating PDF conversion as a stretch goal. They refined the user experience by deciding that long paragraphs should be broken into smaller elements but retain visual continuity cues, and that navigation must be via a vertical scroll requiring a full, deliberate swipe to advance. Finally, the design specified that previous content should remain visible but faded at approximately 15% opacity, maintaining context without distracting the reader.
